compiled_state.title: generate-test-index.sh matches node_modules and other dependency directories as false positive test associations
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
generate-test-index.sh and fuzzy-match.sh both use raw 'find $repo_root -type f' with zero exclusion flags. This causes node_modules/, vendor/, .venv/, bower_components/, __pypackages__/, .gradle/, Pods/, and other dependency directories to be matched as test file associations. Observed in beta testing on a Node/TypeScript project where 14 of 17 fuzzy matches pointed to node_modules files.

Fix: Add exclusion flags (-not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.venv/*' etc.) to the find commands in both generate-test-index.sh and fuzzy-match.sh. Use .gitignore as a secondary signal for project-specific exclusions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause: find commands in generate-test-index.sh and fuzzy-match.sh lack exclusion flags for dependency dirs.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
